scripts.ready: vp check && vp run -r test && vp run -r build
scripts.pack:dry-run: vp run core#build && vp run react#build && vp run testing#build && pnpm --filter @view-server/core pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter @view-server/react pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter @view-server/testing pack --dry-run
